negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_8027fcfb-5f16-4012-8efb-3377cc7c1f5a
prompt: A middle-aged woman is captured in a low-angle, medium shot, pouring a liquid from a large metallic pot into a smaller metallic pail. The scene is dynamic, with random camera movements adding a sense of immediacy. The woman, dressed in a short-sleeved, bright blue T-shirt, is adorned with a colorful fabric wrapped around her body. This fabric is predominantly bright orange with a yellow leaf pattern, and a segment of a black and yellow geometric design is visible near her hips. She wears gold, white, silver, and brown bangles on both wrists, along with an oval, coral ring on her left ring finger. Her black, partially gray hair is tied back, and she has a pink dot on her forehead and a round, yellow earring in her left ear. She is bent forward, gripping the large, metallic pot with both hands, which balances on a rustic, terracotta surface. Using pink fabrics, she carefully holds the pot's mouth as she tilts it slowly downward, pouring a transparent liquid into the smaller metallic pail positioned below. Steam rises from the pot as she follows the motion with her eyes and moves her lips, indicating concentration. She then crouches, resting her left arm on her left knee while continuing to pour the fluid. The background reveals an earthy-toned space with a thatched roof supported by logs. The wall behind her is divided into two sections: a light yellowish-brown upper part and a darker lower section. Various fabrics in shades of orange, yellow, pink, blue, and white hang from the roof, and a green and white object is visible near the left edge of the screen. Soft, bright, ambient lighting illuminates the scene, creating a warm and intimate atmosphere.
